Use.title: Lists.
Use.subtitle: Bullets without the markup overhead.
Use.inside1: Ul · bullet list, JSON or Li children
Use.inside2: Ol · numbered list with start + style controls
Use.inside3: Li · per-item overrides for weight + colour
Use.epigraph: The bullet's job is rhythm. The body's job is meaning.
Use.leftMeta: 2 list nodes · 1 item element · marker controls

Use.title: Ul / Ol — bullet and number lists
Use.lede: Two list nodes that share the same Li children. Items can also be supplied via the JSON `items` attribute when authors prefer data-style input.

VStack.Text: three items, second item bold via Li attributes

Ul.Li: White canvas, dark ink type, modest weights.
Brand voltage lives in full-bleed signature cards.
Section rhythm: white → coral → white → cream → dark.

VStack.Text: numberStartAt=4 · numbered items pick up from 4

Ol.Li: Reserve the primary CTA for one viewport-level action.
Pair it with a hairline-outlined secondary CTA.
Anchor every editorial band with 96px section padding.
Reserve the primary CTA for one viewport-level action.
Pair it with a hairline-outlined secondary CTA.
